source: WEAPONS_DATA in index.html — strictly filtered for Gloranthan attestation
policy: Only weapons attested from Mythras Core (p.62-67) or named for Gloranthan setting (AiG cultures, Dara Happan, Pelorian, Praxian, Orlanthi, etc.) are included. All non-Gloranthan supplement weapons (Japanese, Indian, firearms, Celtic-named, etc.) have been removed.

gloranthan_variants.source: Adventures in Glorantha combat styles (p.26-41) + Gloranthan setting conventions
gloranthan_variants.note: Bronze-Age variants (MB prefix = Monster Broo/primitive), setting-specific shields (Orlanthi, Praxian, Pelorian, Dara Happan), Kopis (common Gloranthan sidearm)
